description: Migrate remaining plugins (figma, github, x, reddit, doordash, dominos, panda-express, airbnb, clickhouse, cockroachdb, asana, airtable, stackoverflow, linkedin, teams) to use SDK utilities where applicable: replace manual waitForAuth with waitUntil, replace manual cookie/localStorage/globalThis access with SDK equivalents. Also fix the Reddit bug where raw Error is thrown instead of ToolError.

userStories.title: Migrate Figma plugin to SDK utilities
userStories.description: Replace Figma's manual token persistence with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache and manual waitForAuth with waitUntil.
acceptanceCriteria: getPersistedAuth/setPersistedAuth/clearPersistedAuth replaced with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache using namespace 'figma'
waitForFigmaAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/figma/src/figma-api.ts

Context:
Figma already uses getCookie from SDK (good). Two patterns to migrate:
1. Token persistence — replace with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache using namespace 'figma'. Figma stores a FigmaAuth object.
2. waitForFigmaAuth — standard polling pattern, replace with waitUntil.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change figmaApi() or any tool files
- Figma already imports getCookie from SDK — keep that

userStories.title: Migrate GitHub plugin — replace waitForAuth with waitUntil
userStories.description: Replace GitHub's manual waitForAuth polling with SDK waitUntil.
acceptanceCriteria: waitForAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
No setInterval or clearInterval calls remain in auth code
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/github/src/github-api.ts

Context:
GitHub's auth detection reads a meta tag. The waitForAuth uses manual setInterval. Replace with waitUntil. Also consider replacing the meta tag read with getMetaContent.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change api() or apiRaw() or any tool files

userStories.title: Migrate X (Twitter) plugin — replace cookie/global access and waitForAuth
userStories.description: Replace X's manual cookie access with getCookie, manual globalThis access with getPageGlobal, and manual waitForAuth with waitUntil.
acceptanceCriteria: document.cookie.match(/ct0=([^;]+)/) replaced with getCookie('ct0')
globalThis.__META_DATA__ access uses getPageGlobal
waitForXAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/x/src/x-api.ts

Context:
1. Cookie: `document.cookie.match(/ct0=([^;]+)/)` → `getCookie('ct0')`
2. Global: `globalThis.__META_DATA__.isLoggedIn` → `getPageGlobal('__META_DATA__.isLoggedIn')`
3. waitForXAuth — standard polling.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change graphqlQuery/graphqlMutation/restApi functions or any tool files

userStories.title: Migrate Reddit plugin — replace cookie access, waitForAuth, and fix ToolError bug
userStories.description: Replace Reddit's manual cookie access with getCookie, manual waitForAuth with waitUntil. Fix the bug where get-post.ts throws raw Error instead of ToolError.
acceptanceCriteria: document.cookie.match(/csrf_token=([^;]+)/) replaced with getCookie('csrf_token')
waitForAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
get-post.ts throws ToolError.notFound instead of new Error
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/reddit/src/reddit-api.ts (cookie + waitForAuth)
- plugins/reddit/src/tools/get-post.ts (ToolError bug fix)

Context:
1. Cookie: `document.cookie.match(/csrf_token=([^;]+)/)` → `getCookie('csrf_token')`
2. waitForAuth uses 3000ms timeout (not 5000).
3. BUG: plugins/reddit/src/tools/get-post.ts: `throw new Error('Post not found')` should be `throw ToolError.notFound('Post not found')`. Import ToolError from SDK.

Constraints:
- Reddit's waitForAuth uses 3000ms timeout — preserve this
- Do NOT change redditGet/redditPost/redditOAuthPost or other tool files

userStories.title: Migrate DoorDash plugin — replace cookie, localStorage, and waitForAuth
userStories.description: Replace DoorDash's manual cookie check, localStorage access, and waitForAuth with SDK equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: document.cookie.includes('dd_cx_logged_in') replaced with getCookie('dd_cx_logged_in') !== null
document.cookie.match(/csrf_token=([^;]+)/) replaced with getCookie('csrf_token')
localStorage.getItem('consumerId') replaced with getLocalStorage('consumerId')
waitForAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/doordash/src/doordash-api.ts

Constraints:
- Do NOT change the GraphQL function or any tool files

userStories.title: Migrate Dominos plugin — replace cookie, waitForAuth, and waitForElement
userStories.description: Replace Dominos' manual cookie parsing with getCookie, manual waitForAuth with waitUntil, and manual waitForElement in place-order-cash.ts with SDK waitForSelector.
acceptanceCriteria: Local getCookie function removed — replaced by getCookie from SDK
waitForAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
waitForElement in place-order-cash.ts replaced with waitForSelector from SDK
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/dominos/src/dominos-api.ts (cookie + waitForAuth)
- plugins/dominos/src/tools/place-order-cash.ts (waitForElement → waitForSelector)

Context:
1. Cookie: manual getCookie → import from SDK.
2. waitForAuth — standard polling.
3. place-order-cash.ts has a custom `waitForElement()` that uses polling (setInterval). The SDK's `waitForSelector()` uses MutationObserver (more efficient). Note: waitForSelector throws on timeout, while the custom function resolves with null. The caller should wrap in try-catch.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change the GraphQL function or other tool files

userStories.title: Migrate remaining plugins — Panda Express, Airbnb, ClickHouse, CockroachDB, Asana, Airtable, StackOverflow, LinkedIn, Teams
userStories.description: Apply the standard SDK migrations to the remaining plugins: replace manual cookie/localStorage/globalThis access and waitForAuth patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: Panda Express: manual localStorage.getItem replaced with getLocalStorage, waitForAuth uses waitUntil
Airbnb: manual getCookie replaced with SDK getCookie, waitForAuth uses waitUntil
ClickHouse: manual localStorage.getItem replaced with getLocalStorage, manual window cast replaced with getPageGlobal, waitForAuth uses waitUntil
CockroachDB: manual globalThis cast replaced with getPageGlobal('initData'), waitForAuth uses waitUntil
Asana: manual window.env access replaced with getPageGlobal, waitForAuth uses waitUntil
Airtable: manual window.initData access replaced with getPageGlobal, waitForAuth uses waitUntil
StackOverflow: manual StackExchange global access replaced with getPageGlobal, waitForAuth uses waitUntil
LinkedIn: manual document.cookie.match replaced with getCookie, waitForAuth uses waitUntil
Teams: waitForAuth uses waitUntil
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/panda-express/src/panda-api.ts
- plugins/airbnb/src/airbnb-api.ts
- plugins/clickhouse/src/clickhouse-api.ts
- plugins/cockroachdb/src/cockroachdb-api.ts
- plugins/asana/src/asana-api.ts
- plugins/airtable/src/airtable-api.ts
- plugins/stackoverflow/src/stackoverflow-api.ts
- plugins/linkedin/src/linkedin-api.ts
- plugins/teams/src/teams-api.ts

For each plugin:
1. Replace manual waitForAuth polling with waitUntil pattern
2. Replace manual cookie/localStorage/global access with SDK equivalents

Key specifics:
- LinkedIn's JSESSIONID cookie value may have surrounding double quotes — the SDK getCookie does URI decoding but does NOT strip quotes. If the current code strips quotes, add `.replace(/"/g, '')` after getCookie.
- Teams uses 8000ms timeout for waitUntil (not 5000)
- CockroachDB uses getPageGlobal for `initData` and `proto`

Constraints:
- This is a large story touching 9 plugins. Each plugin change is independent.
- Do NOT change any API wrapper functions or tool logic
